name: Copper Penny Carrot Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the carrots and pour them into a large bowl.
2. Add the onions and bell pepper to the bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: tomato soup, sugar, prepared mustard, garlic, salad oil, vinegar, salt, and pepper.
4. Mix well until all ingredients are thoroughly combined.
5. Pour the mixture over the carrot, onion, and bell pepper in the large bowl.
6. Mix everything together gently.
7. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving. The longer it marinates, the better it will be.
